overall.description: First-person cockpit view from a flying vehicle navigating through Night City in Cyberpunk 2077. The vehicle traverses neon-lit urban canyons, passes holographic advertisements and giant projected koi fish, transitioning between districts including The Glen, Vista del Rey, and Corpo Plaza before ascending past corporate towers.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered elevated transit corridor through commercial district

events.description: exiting the covered corridor section into open air between skyscrapers

agents.ego_description: piloting a flying vehicle through a covered urban canyon lined with neon advertisements and corporate signage

entered.detail: metal and glass roof structure covering the elevated transit path
illuminated directional sign indicating City Center district
dense collection of colorful neon advertisements and corporate logos on building facades
tall skyscraper with illuminated windows lining the corridor

segments.scene_description: The segment begins inside a covered elevated transit corridor in the City Center district, surrounded by glass office towers and dense neon signage. The vehicle maintains a steady forward flight path as it transitions from the sheltered section into the open air between skyscrapers.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense urban canyon with street-level commercial activity in The Glen district

events.description: vehicle descends from elevated corridor toward street level
passing from covered corridor to open intersection with visible street traffic below

agents.ego_description: descending through the urban canyon toward street level, navigating between skyscrapers while passing commercial signs in The Glen district

entered.detail: yellow illuminated sign for El Dorado Pawn Shop on building facade
white and black directional sign for Nokota corporation
large vertical holographic display showing a woman in red attire
green navigation marker indicating entry into The Glen district

segments.scene_description: The vehicle descends from the elevated corridor into The Glen district, passing the El Dorado Pawn Shop and Nokota signs. A large holographic advertisement of a woman in red becomes prominent on the left as the vehicle approaches street level, with sparse traffic visible on the roads below.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark elevated transit corridor transitioning to Vista del Rey plaza

events.description: emerging from dark corridor into brightly lit plaza with massive holographic displays
giant holographic red and blue koi fish appear swimming through the air between buildings

agents.ego_description: flying through a dark narrow corridor between buildings before emerging into Vista del Rey with massive holographic koi fish visible ahead

entered.detail: green navigation marker indicating entry into Vista del Rey district
massive red holographic koi fish swimming through the air between skyscrapers
large blue holographic koi fish accompanying the red one in the plaza airspace

segments.scene_description: The vehicle traverses a dark narrow corridor between buildings before emerging into Vista del Rey, where the lighting dramatically shifts to reveal massive holographic red and blue koi fish swimming through the air. The environment transitions from dimly lit passages to a vibrant plaza filled with holographic displays.

scene_state.functional_zone: corporate plaza with massive holographic displays and dense neon advertising

events.description: banking sharply around the holographic koi fish in a wide arc

agents.ego_description: maneuvering around giant holographic koi fish in Corpo Plaza, banking sharply to navigate around the massive aerial displays while surrounded by towering neon-lit skyscrapers

entered.detail: green navigation marker indicating entry into Corpo Plaza district

segments.scene_description: The vehicle enters Corpo Plaza and performs a wide banking maneuver around the massive holographic koi fish that dominate the airspace. The red and blue holographic fish swim past the vehicle at close range as it navigates through the dense cluster of corporate towers and neon advertisements.

scene_state.functional_zone: high-rise corporate tower approach with Petrochem facilities

events.description: ascending rapidly past the Petrochem tower and circular logo building

agents.ego_description: ascending vertically past corporate skyscrapers including the Petrochem building and a tower with a circular medical logo, gaining altitude above the city

entered.detail: tall dark skyscraper with large white circular logo near the top
corporate building with illuminated PETROCHEM signage on the facade

segments.scene_description: The vehicle ascends rapidly past the Petrochem building and a distinctive tower bearing a circular logo, leaving the holographic koi fish behind. The camera tilts upward as the vehicle gains altitude, revealing the upper reaches of the corporate towers against the night sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous flight path that transitions from a sheltered urban transit corridor into the open, neon-drenched airspace of a lower city district. It begins within a covered elevated corridor in the City Center, gliding past glass office towers and dense signage. As the vehicle maintains its steady forward momentum, the scene opens from the sheltered structure into the open air between towering skyscrapers. The camera then descends toward The Glen district, passing the El Dorado Pawn Shop and Nokota signs as the environment shifts toward street level. Finally, the view expands to reveal a prominent holographic advertisement of a woman in red on the left, overlooking the sparse traffic of the roads below.

The shot follows a continuous flight from a dark urban corridor into a vibrant holographic plaza before ascending high above the corporate skyline. It begins by traversing a narrow, dimly lit passage between buildings, which suddenly opens into Vista del Rey as the lighting shifts to reveal massive red and blue holographic koi fish swimming through the air. As the vehicle enters Corpo Plaza, it performs a wide banking maneuver, weaving closely past the glowing fish and through a dense cluster of neon advertisements and corporate towers. The scene then shifts from horizontal navigation to a rapid vertical climb, ascending past the Petrochem building and a tower with a circular logo. Finally, the camera tilts upward as the vehicle gains altitude, leaving the holographic displays behind to reveal the upper reaches of the skyscrapers against the night sky.
